name: Register and enter canvas happy path
description: Registers a new user with a unique name and PIN, and verifies they are successfully redirected to the multiplayer canvas with a LIVE indicator.

planSteps.description: Click the identity name input field and type a unique random username like 'User' followed by 5 random numbers
Enter the digit 1 in the first PIN field, 2 in the second, 3 in the third, and 4 in the fourth field
Enter the digit 1 in the first confirm PIN field, 2 in the second, 3 in the third, and 4 in the fourth field
Verify the browser URL redirects to /canvas
Verify the LIVE status indicator badge is visible on the canvas header
